ocr_findings.description: Page number '398' shown at image bottom not present in cleaned OCR output — cosmetic

reviewer_notes: Claude-Vision cleaned version used (has_cleaned=true). Content is デバイスドライバ and プラグアンドプレイ section. Both 試験にはコレが出る callout boxes captured correctly with all four bullet points (USB/バスパワー/HDMI/Bluetooth) and the final device-driver summary bullet. Cleaned OCR is excellent — no character errors, proper markdown bold markup for key terms matches image emphasis. High confidence pass.
